message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
participant "finest level" as FL
participant "intermediate level(s)" as IL
participant "base level" as BL

note over FL: U(k,2) -> F(U(k,2))

FL -> FL: SDC

note over FL: U(k',2) -> F(U(k',2))

FL -> IL: restrict

note over IL: U(k,1) -> F(U(k,1))

IL -> IL: FAS

note over IL: tau = Q(1)*F(U(k,1)) - R*Q(2)*F(U(k',2))

IL -> IL: SDC with FAS

note over IL: U(k',1) -> F(U(k',1))

IL -> BL: restrict

note over BL: U(k,0) -> F(U(k,0))

BL -> BL: FAS

note over BL: tau = Q(0)*F(U(k,0)) - R*Q(1)*F(U(k',1))

BL -> BL: SDC with FAS

note over BL: U(k+,0) -> F(U(k+,0))

BL -> BL: coarse correction

note over BL: c(0) = U(k+,0) - R*U(k',1)

BL -> IL: prolongate

IL -> IL: correct

note over IL: U(k",1) = U(k',1) + P*c(0)

IL -> IL: SDC

note over IL: U(k+,1) -> F(U(k+,1))

IL -> IL: coarse correction

note over IL: c(1) = U(k+,1) - R*U(k',2)

IL -> FL: prolongate

FL -> FL: correct

note over FL: U(k",2) = U(k',2) + P*c(1)

FL -> FL: SDC

note over FL: U(k+,2) -> F(U(k+,2))

@enduml
```
